message:
feat(agent): add ExtensionError variant to AgentEvent and propagate
structured extension errors through RPC and print-mode pipelines

src/agent.rs:
- Add AgentEvent::ExtensionError { extension_id, event, error } variant
  for structured reporting of extension dispatch failures
- Add event_label match arm in abort_tests module

src/extensions.rs:
- Add ExtensionError to the event-type exclusion list in
  extension_event_from_agent (extension errors should not re-dispatch
  to extensions, preventing infinite loops)
- Inline map_err for WASM linker error formatting (rustfmt)

src/rpc.rs:
- Replace ad-hoc JSON error construction with structured
  AgentEvent::ExtensionError { extension_id: None, event, error }
  serialized via serde, ensuring consistent event schema

src/main.rs (partial — extension error in print mode):
- Mirror the RPC error forwarding pattern: emit AgentEvent::ExtensionError
  as JSON to stdout when emit_json_events is true, giving print-mode
  consumers visibility into extension dispatch failures

8 test files (event_label exhaustive match):
- agent_loop_reliability, agent_loop_vcr, agent_tools_coverage,
  e2e_agent_loop, e2e_failure_injection_recovery, e2e_high_risk_workflows,
  e2e_interruption_resume_replay, e2e_soak_stability — all add the
  ExtensionError match arm to their event_label/format_event helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
